title: MD
biography: Babatunde Osotimehin was a Nigerian physician who served as Executive Director of UNFPA (United Nations Population Fund). He championed family planning, maternal health, and youth empowerment globally.
aiSummary: Babatunde Osotimehin is a reproductive health specialist at UNFPA. Based in Nigeria.
